name: express-api
description: ├── config/         🔧  Settings (DB connection, env vars, logger) ├── models/         🗃️  Database table shapes (Mongoose schemas) ├── middlewares/    🚦  Code that runs BEFORE your handler (auth, validation, rate-limit) ├── routes/         🗺️  URL → handler mapping (what URL calls what function) ├── controllers/    📬  Receives the HTTP request, sends the HTTP response ├── services/       🧠  The actual business logic (talks to the DB) └── utils/          🔨  Reusable helpers (ApiError, ApiResponse, catchAsync)
